title: Role decomposition edges
description: Schema for shared/role_decomposition_edges.csv. Rows define child roles activated by a role_decomposition representation.

parent_representation_id.description: Representation option whose kind is role_decomposition.

parent_role_id.description: Role satisfied by the decomposition representation.

child_role_id.description: Child role activated when the parent representation is selected.

edge_kind.description: Whether the child role is required for coverage when the decomposition is selected.

is_required.description: True when the child role must be represented for this decomposition to cover the parent role.

display_order.description: Stable ordering for decomposition children in documentation and user interfaces.

coverage_notes.description: Coverage notes explaining the child role relationship.
